metadata.description: Plugin marketplace for CRAFT — this repository ships the plugin and the marketplace manifest together. Add it with /plugin marketplace add ChriRas/craft, then install with /plugin install craft@craft.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Universal coding workflow plugin: a 9-phase loop with explicit knowledge management, autonomy controls, vertical slicing, and bug-verification — works identically across shell scripts, libraries, REST APIs, full-stack apps, and infrastructure code.
